Introducing a Game-Changer for Retail Product Merchandising

(HP) High Performance Pusher™

Introducing the revolutionary (HP) High Performance Pusher, a game-changer for retail product merchandising. Unlike any other pusher on the market, the HP Pusher offers unparalleled control and versatility. Its unique, ultra-slow push rate enhances the customer shopping experience by ensuring products are always front and center, while simultaneously simplifying restocking for associates.

This heavy-duty proprietary slow-push system is remarkably adaptable, capable of smoothly and consistently facing both lightweight items and products weighing up to 40 lbs*, all at the same controlled speed. The HP Pusher represents a significant advancement in retail shelf management solutions, offering retailers a superior way to optimize product presentation and streamline operations across every aisle and every category.

From lightweight cereal boxes and vitamin bottles to heavy wine bottles, bleach, and large-format laundry detergent, the HP Pusher's proprietary slow-push mechanism applies measured, uniform pressure across the full shelf depth automatically. One system. Every aisle. Every category.

Want to learn more? Fill out the Request Information form below.

The Shelf Management Challenge

Most Shelf Management Systems Were Not Built for Heavy Products

Standard spring-feed pushers are engineered around lightweight CPG. When retailers attempt to apply them to heavy bottles, dense jugs, or bulky household products, the result is simple: other solutions on the market cannot push these heavier products at all. Fallen product, empty facings, and staff spending their entire shift recovering shelves rather than serving customers, the very problem a shelf management system was supposed to solve.

At the opposite end of the weight spectrum, the same limitation applies. Standard pushers are simply incapable of handling the load, causing product to tip, fall sideways, or jam in the channel. There was no solution on the market that addressed both ends of the weight spectrum until now. It required a fundamentally different mechanism, and that is where Sennco innovated once again with a patent-pending design.

Real-world deployment, heavy household products category
Built for the Full Weight Spectrum

One Shelf Management System. Every Aisle in Your Store.

The HP Pusher proprietary slow-push system handles the complete range of product weights found in grocery, mass, drug, and specialty retail. No other pusher on the market delivers this breadth of product coverage. Today, retailers are forced to stock different springs and pusher configurations for each product type, adding operational complexity, installation time, and unnecessary cost to every planogram change.

The Sennco (HP) High Performance Pusher™ changes that entirely. Whether the product is lightweight or heavy, the HP Pusher™ handles it with only two sizes, delivering simplicity, speed to market, and full planogram compliance across every aisle in your store.

Heavy Weight

The Category Other Systems Can Not Handle

The HP Pusher's proprietary slow-push mechanism was built specifically for products that break standard spring-feed shelf management systems. Consistent facing for the heaviest items in your store.

  • Laundry detergent, large format
  • Bleach and household cleaners
  • Wine bottles and spirits
  • Olive oil and cooking oils
  • Large format water and juice jugs
  • Motor oil and automotive fluids
  • Cat litter and pet supplies
  • Bulk paper products
Medium Weight

High-Velocity Center Store and Refrigerated

The same system that handles bleach and wine manages your highest-turn center store and refrigerated categories with equal consistency and zero reconfiguration.

  • Ready-to-drink beverages, single cans and multipacks
  • Condiments and sauces
  • Canned goods
  • Bottled water and sports drinks
  • Dairy and refrigerated products
  • Baby formula and nutrition
  • Jarred foods and spreads
  • Frozen entrees and side dishes
Light Weight

Smaller Format, High-Turn Categories

Where facing consistency drives purchase decisions, the HP Pusher maintains clean shelf presentation for your highest-margin lighter weight categories throughout the day.

  • Cereal boxes and breakfast items
  • Vitamins and supplements
  • OTC pharmaceuticals
  • Personal care and health and beauty
  • Snacks and packaged foods
  • Spices and baking ingredients
  • Cosmetics and accessories
  • Electronic accessories and small goods

The Proprietary Slow-Push Difference

Built Where Every Other Shelf Management System Stops

Every standard shelf management system on the market uses a fixed-tension spring. That works for lightweight products. For heavy items such as wine bottles, bleach, or large-format detergent, a standard spring either overwhelms the product or loses tension entirely as the channel empties.

The (HP) High Performance Pusher uses a proprietary slow-push mechanism that applies controlled, consistent forward pressure regardless of product weight. The result is the same clean presentation at the front of the shelf whether the channel is full or nearly empty, and no product tipping, jamming, or falling in the process.

This is not an incremental improvement over standard pushers. It is a different category of shelf management system.

  • Proprietary slow-push mechanism maintains consistent pressure across the full shelf depth
  • Handles products from lightweight packaged goods up to 40 lbs
  • Performs in ambient, refrigerated, and on-shelf environments
  • Adjustable channel width fits any SKU format across any category
  • Little to no shelf modifications required, installs on standard gondola fixtures
  • Integrated dividers prevent product from catching or tipping during restocking
  • Simplifies distributor stocking with clearly defined product channels
Shelf Management Across Every Category

The Same System That Manages Bleach Manages Cereal

Most retailers manage heavy and light categories with entirely different shelf management systems. That means multiple vendors, multiple training requirements, and multiple installation processes. The (HP) High Performance Pusher proprietary slow-push system eliminates that complexity with one solution across every aisle.

Light Weight Category Cereal, breakfast items, packaged goods, vitamins, OTC and health and beauty
Heavy Weight Category Bleach, laundry detergent, household cleaners, wine, cooking oils and bulk liquids
"

"They save me roughly 30 minutes combing through shelves looking for empty spots."

Store Associate Active Field Deployment, Beverage Category

Store teams and distributor reps in active deployments consistently report that the HP Pusher shelf management system reduces manual recovery time and simplifies the restocking process across every category where it is installed.

"I love those things. They are fantastic."

Distributor Representative Active Field Deployment, RTD Beverage Category
Built to Scale

One System. Every Store. Every Category.

The (HP) High Performance Pusher shelf management system is designed for replication. The same proprietary slow-push mechanism that manages heavy wine bottles in one aisle manages vitamins in another. No reconfiguration, no new hardware, no additional training.

Because the HP Pusher installs on standard gondola shelving with little to no modifications, the rollout playbook is consistent whether you are equipping one section or an entire store network. What works in one location is plug-and-play across your organization.

Real-world deployment data is available. Contact Sennco to discuss configuration options, results, and next steps for your store format.
